record.sourceCode:
import sys 
sys.set_int_max_str_digits(50000)
a=int(input())
b=int(input())
print(a+b)
print(a-b)
print(a*b)
print(a//b)
print(a%b)

record.sourceCode:
#include<bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;struct node{int g,f;}a[100005];int n,maxf=0,ans;bool cmp(node x,node y){if(x.g!=y.g)return x.g>y.g;return x.f>y.f;}int main(void){cin>>n;for(int i=0;i<n;i++)cin>>a[i].g>>a[i].f;sort(a,a+n,cmp);for(int i=0;i<n;i++)if(a[i].f>maxf)maxf=a[i].f,ans++;cout<<ans;return false;}
